summary: Lead accepts M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 after systems_architect implementation, lead anti-grid/lattice amendment, and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. The accepted branch introduces the authoritative topology schema/read-query/save boundary and tightens downstream tasks so hidden regular grids/lattices cannot pass content-lock recovery.

tests_run.result: format:check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary checks passed.

decisions.decision: Accept the schema task for PR integration; do not mark CLOSED until the accepted branch enters origin/main.
Carry the tightened anti-grid/lattice acceptance standard into M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001, M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001, and M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001.
This ACCEPT does not approve formal M7 content lock or M7 exit validation.

risks.summary: Default player-facing fixture content and client rendering still need migration before the visible map experience is acceptable.
risks.mitigation: Start M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 after this task closes in main.

risks.summary: definitions.routes remains as a compatibility projection bridge.
risks.mitigation: Downstream migration and validation must keep player-facing logic on topology route edges.

requested_action: Open PR, run CI, merge to main when checks pass, then mark M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 CLOSED and start M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001.
